suggestedTitle: Harden roadmap feature-id governance with repo-owned PR metadata fallback
suggestedBodySnippet:
## Feature ID
- PB-V08-KNOWLEDGE-COMPACTION-SPEC-001

## Summary
- Make roadmap feature-id validation accept repo-owned canonical PR metadata in `.playbook/pr-metadata.json`.
- Keep PR title/body as preferred presentation surfaces while allowing validation to pass from repo truth when PR edit permissions are unavailable.
- Add optional metadata sync helper that attempts PR title/body updates and degrades with warnings when permissions are insufficient.
